name: CoBuildr
title: Founder
description: Building CoBuildr – an AI-powered companion that guides solopreneurs and vibe coders from raw idea to validated, scoped product, addressing the gap where building software has become easy but building the right thing remains hard.
Developing a full-stack product with LLM-powered workflows in an AI-native environment, targeting first commit to launch in under three weeks.

name: SEND IT
title: Founder
description: Built and launched SEND IT, a free-to-play social Formula 1 tipping web app where users pick head-to-head driver matchups, participate in public and private leagues, and play against their mates.
Acquired 90+ users, 1,300+ tips, and 15+ leagues within two weeks of launch through organic growth alone.
Developing in an AI-native environment, going from first commit to launch in under 2 weeks.

name: Visagio
title: Intern → Consultant → Senior Consultant / Product Manager
description: Led cross-functional teams to deliver 10+ high-impact digital products to clients across natural resources, oil & gas, and insurance sectors in APAC.
As a product portfolio manager, supporting the management of a $200M USD digital transformation portfolio, driving delivery excellence and value realisation.
As a product manager, led a supply chain planning product suite delivering $17.5M AUD EBITDA uplift; managed a hybrid team of 6+ including BAs, developers, and testers.

As a product developer, built and deployed operational apps across WA mining sites, achieving >95% reduction in manual effort (commentary collector) and 40% cut in driver wait times (resource allocator).
Supported business transformation for a cable manufacturer, unlocking $11.8M AUD EBITDA (38% increase) via pricing and inventory optimisation.

name: South32
title: Summer Intern
description: Gained exposure to the mining industry through a 12-week internship in the Cloud & Productivity team.

name: Melbourne University Tennis Club 🎾
title: Co-President
description: Steered the 300+ members club through the challenges of the COVID-19 pandemic, achieving a 100%+ social media growth through targeted digital campaigns.
Secured financial stability through strategic planning and resource allocation, positioning the club for future success.

name: Higgins Park Tennis Club 🎾
title: Tennis Coach
description: Initially a part-time side hustle while studying, now just do it for fun when I can.
Experienced with player initiation (ages 4-8), technical development (ages 8-12), and match play and tennis IQ development (ages 12+).
